title: Dense Ferment Ethiopian Wagyu Kitfo
description: A rich, chewy, and aromatic Ethiopian dish made with Wagyu beef, fermented kimchi, and spices, all cooked to perfection in a traditional clay tajine.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the Berbere spice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the spice mixture to the ground Wagyu beef and mix well until combined.
Heat the Niter Kibbeh in the clay tajine over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the tajine and sauté for another minute.
Add the fermented kimchi to the tajine and stir to combine with the onion mixture.
Add the spice-coated Wagyu beef to the tajine and stir to combine with the kimchi mixture.
Cover the tajine with a lid and cook over low heat for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the lid and continue cooking for another 5-10 minutes, stirring frequently, until the beef is cooked to desired doneness.
Serve the kitfo hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro and accompanied by a side of injera bread.
